name: Snow White Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening, butter, and sugar until light in color.
2. Add vanilla and mix well.
3. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Alternately add these dry ingredients with milk to the creamed mixture, beating after each addition.
4. Gently fold in egg whites.
5. Pour batter into a greased and lightly floured 9-inch round cake pan.
6. Bake at 375°F for 18 to 20 minutes, or until the cake springs back when lightly touched.
7. Allow cooling in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and finishing cooling completely on a wire rack.
8. Frost with your favorite frosting.
